overall.description: A cinematic sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a neon-lit street food stall at night. The scene opens with a view of noodles cooking in a steaming wok, then the camera moves around the stall to focus on a muscular vendor in a teal tank top. The environment features vibrant cyberpunk aesthetics with glowing signage and atmospheric steam.

large metal wok filled with noodles over an open flame

illuminated digital menu display with cyan text

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a cyberpunk street food stall, focused on a cooking station where a red-haired worker prepares noodles in a steaming wok. Neon lights cast colorful reflections across the metal counter as steam rises from the hot cooking surface. The worker leans forward to adjust the equipment while the camera remains stationary, observing the food preparation process.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk food stall vendor area with cooking equipment

events.description: camera begins panning left around the counter to reveal the vendor
muscular vendor turns to face the camera while smoking

agents.ego_description: walking around the food stall to observe the vendor from different angles

notable_agents.action: muscular vendor in teal tank top is cooking and exhaling smoke

entered.detail: muscular vendor wearing teal tank top and white headband with neck implants

segments.scene_description: The camera begins moving left around the stall, revealing a muscular vendor in a teal tank top who takes over the cooking duties. The vendor turns to face the camera while smoke drifts around him, showcasing cybernetic implants on his neck. The cooking station shifts to the background as the focus moves to the vendor's actions and the surrounding neon-lit environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a close-up of food preparation to a revealing portrait of a cybernetic vendor. It begins at a cyberpunk street food stall, focusing on a red-haired worker preparing noodles in a steaming wok amidst colorful neon reflections on a metal counter. As the camera begins to glide left, the focus transitions away from the cooking station and the rising steam to reveal a muscular vendor in a teal tank top. The scene then expands to showcase the vendor's cybernetic neck implants as he turns toward the lens, while the cooking station recedes into the background. Finally, the movement settles on the vendor, framed by the drifting smoke and the vibrant, glowing signage of the surrounding environment.
